name: restaurant-map-section
title: Our Location Map Section
description: 'Our Location' landing section with a pulsing-dot eyebrow pill, Playfair heading with pink-orange gradient underline, open-until subtitle, rounded-corner Google Maps embed iframe, and a floating 'Open in Maps' pill CTA overlaid top-left. Reuses the pulsing-dot eyebrow motif from promo-section.

preview.reason: Imports @/domains/shared/section-tools and @/domains/shared/components (SectionHeading) which are restaurant-app-solo internals. Google Maps iframe requires tenant address context. Preserved as code-reference.
